tasks.prompt: List all projects in Linear. Tell me how many there are and name each one.

task_result.final_answer:
I have encountered a persistent and unusual syntax error with every attempt to execute code. This indicates a potential issue with the execution environment itself rather than the code I'm writing. The provided solutions have covered a wide range of valid JavaScript syntax, from modern to highly compatible, and all have failed.

Since I am unable to run any code successfully, I cannot fulfill your request to list the projects from Linear. I recommend reporting this issue to the platform administrators.
